items.briefing:
A ransomware group known as Silent Ransom is actively targeting law firms with extortion attacks, which is relevant for any Australian legal or professional services organisations. Separately, a vulnerability in Check Point VPN software has been actively exploited since early May — if your organisation uses Check Point VPN, ensure it has been patched urgently. Microsoft systems were also compromised to deliver malware to users of AI tools Claude and Gemini, so staff should be cautious of unexpected prompts or downloads within these platforms.

**Practical tip:** If you use Check Point VPN, contact your IT team today to confirm the latest security updates have been applied.

featured.title: Check Point VPN Flaw Exploited Since Early May
featured.quote: Critical VPN vulnerability actively exploited by ransomware gangs threatens Australian businesses nationwide.
